synthesis.summary: Rewards GraphQL API timeout/JWT-auth errors for the wemalaysia brand. Giancarlo acked within a minute; Sam Lundborg identified the pattern as wemalaysia's own frontend occasionally sending a malformed ('Bearer null') JWT before a valid one — a known, recurring behavior on their side, not an FT bug. Errors stopped on their own; team agreed to raise it with Ryan Yu Monday. Lead handed to James Hodgson, status moved to Monitoring.
key_events: 18 Jul 16:44 UTC alert fires, Giancarlo acks within a minute
18 Jul 19:08-19:13 CEST Sam Lundborg identifies root cause: wemalaysia frontend sends bad JWT before a good one — errors already stopped
18 Jul 21:21 CEST status moved to Monitoring with note 'will pick this up on monday'
18 Jul 22:50 CEST lead handed to James Hodgson
proposals: Raise JWT-generation timing with Ryan Yu Monday — agreed, not yet actioned
synthesis.why: Fast ack, clear root cause identified same evening, errors already self-resolved, and a reasonable next-business-day follow-up plan — no breach.
